title: New structure
description: New structures, Monsters, Ore and New adventure
body:
Hello im Sinister331 Im new owner of this mode The past owner cant update the mode and now i will update New Structure
Mode adds 5 new Structures there is Ruins, Abandoned house, Obelisk, The Temple Of Forest and The ancient temple
Mode adds 2 new ores Blue slime ore and Crystalls
mode also adds new 2 monsters TheChegr is A Terryfying Worm and blue slime Not a ordinary slime
